先听总故事

Discord

这一页像一本关于“Discord”的小绘本，它先告诉我们这位机器人朋友会做什么，再一步一步解释什么时候该这样做。 你可以先把它想成：Discord (Bot 对话接口)。

原始路径：/channels/discord 章节数量：19 查看原文

第 1 站

Start Here

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Start Here”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Discord (Bot 对话接口)”。

原文小纸条

# Discord (Bot API)

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Status: ready for DMs and guild 消息通道s via the official Discord 门口的小门卫.”。

原文小纸条

Status: ready for DMs and guild channels via the official Discord gateway.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Card大家一起的房间> <Card title="Pairing" icon="link" href="/消息通道s/pairing"> Discord DMs default to pairing mode. </Card>”。

原文小纸条

<CardGroup> <Card title="Pairing" icon="link" href="/channels/pairing"> Discord DMs default to pairing mode. </Card>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Card title="Slash 魔法口令s" icon="terminal" href="/工具小帮手s/slash-魔法口令s"> Native 魔法口令 behavior and 魔法口令 catalog. </Card>”。

原文小纸条

<Card title="Slash commands" icon="terminal" href="/tools/slash-commands"> Native command behavior and command catalog. </Card>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Card title="消息通道 troubleshooting" icon="wrench" href="/消息通道s/troubleshooting"> Cross-消息通道 diagnostics and repair flow.…”。

原文小纸条

<Card title="Channel troubleshooting" icon="wrench" href="/channels/troubleshooting"> Cross-channel diagnostics and repair flow. </Card> </CardGroup>

第 2 站

Quick setup

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Quick setup”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“You will need to create a new application with a bot, add the bot to your 大房子服务器, and pair it to OpenClaw. We recommend…”。

原文小纸条

You will need to create a new application with a bot, add the bot to your server, and pair it to OpenClaw. We recommend adding your bot to your own private server. If you don't have one yet, create one first (choose **Create My Own > For me and my friends**).

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Steps> <Step title="Create a Discord application and bot"> Go to the Discord Developer Portal and click **New Applicat…”。

原文小纸条

<Steps> <Step title="Create a Discord application and bot"> Go to the Discord Developer Portal and click **New Application**. Name it something like "OpenClaw".

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Click **Bot** on the sidebar. Set the **Username** to whatever you call your OpenClaw 机器人朋友. </Step>”。

原文小纸条

Click **Bot** on the sidebar. Set the **Username** to whatever you call your OpenClaw agent. </Step>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Step title="Enable privileged intents"> Still on the **Bot** page, scroll down to **Privileged 门口的小门卫 Intents** and en…”。

原文小纸条

<Step title="Enable privileged intents"> Still on the **Bot** page, scroll down to **Privileged Gateway Intents** and enable:

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“</Step>”。

原文小纸条

</Step>

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Quick setup”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：**小纸条消息 Content Intent** (required)、**大房子服务器 Members Intent** (recommended; r…、**Presence Intent** (optional; only neede…。

原文小纸条
  • **Message Content Intent** (required)
  • **Server Members Intent** (recommended; required for role allowlists and name-to-ID matching)
  • **Presence Intent** (optional; only needed for presence updates)
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Step title="Copy your bot token"> Scroll back up on the **Bot** page and click **Reset Token**.”。

原文小纸条

<Step title="Copy your bot token"> Scroll back up on the **Bot** page and click **Reset Token**.

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Quick setup”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：View 消息通道s、Send 小纸条消息s、Read 小纸条消息 History、Embed Links。

  • Send Messages
  • Read Message History
  • Embed Links

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Copy the generated URL at the bottom, paste it into your browser, select your 大房子服务器, and click **Continue** to connect…”。

原文小纸条

Copy the generated URL at the bottom, paste it into your browser, select your server, and click **Continue** to connect. You should now see your bot in the Discord server. </Step>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Step title="Enable Developer Mode and collect your IDs"> Back in the Discord app, you need to enable Developer Mode so…”。

原文小纸条

<Step title="Enable Developer Mode and collect your IDs"> Back in the Discord app, you need to enable Developer Mode so you can copy internal IDs.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“1. Click **User Settings** (gear icon next to your avatar) → **Advanced** → toggle on **Developer Mode** 2. Right-click…”。

原文小纸条

1. Click **User Settings** (gear icon next to your avatar) → **Advanced** → toggle on **Developer Mode** 2. Right-click your **server icon** in the sidebar → **Copy Server ID** 3. Right-click your **own avatar** → **Copy User ID**

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Save your **大房子服务器 ID** and **User ID** alongside your Bot Token — you'll send all three to OpenClaw in the next step.…”。

原文小纸条

Save your **Server ID** and **User ID** alongside your Bot Token — you'll send all three to OpenClaw in the next step. </Step>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Step title="Allow DMs from 大房子服务器 members"> For pairing to work, Discord needs to allow your bot to DM you. Right-clic…”。

原文小纸条

<Step title="Allow DMs from server members"> For pairing to work, Discord needs to allow your bot to DM you. Right-click your **server icon** → **Privacy Settings** → toggle on **Direct Messages**.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“This lets 大房子服务器 members (including bots) send you DMs. Keep this enabled if you want to use Discord DMs with OpenClaw.…”。

原文小纸条

This lets server members (including bots) send you DMs. Keep this enabled if you want to use Discord DMs with OpenClaw. If you only plan to use guild channels, you can disable DMs after pairing. </Step>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Step title="Set your bot token securely (do not send it in chat)"> Your Discord bot token is a secret (like a 秘密口令). S…”。

原文小纸条

<Step title="Set your bot token securely (do not send it in chat)"> Your Discord bot token is a secret (like a password). Set it on the machine running OpenClaw before messaging your agent.

像讲绘本

这一小段像旁白，提醒我们现在讲到哪一步了。

原文小纸条

``bash theme={"theme":{"light":"min-light","dark":"min-dark"}} export DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN="YOUR_BOT_TOKEN" openclaw config set channels.discord.token --ref-provider default --ref-source env --ref-id DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN --dry-run openclaw config set channels.discord.token --ref-provider default --ref-source env --ref-id DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN openclaw config set channels.discord.enabled true --strict-json openclaw gateway ``

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“If OpenClaw is already running as a background service, use openclaw 门口的小门卫 restart instead. </Step>”。

原文小纸条

If OpenClaw is already running as a background service, use openclaw gateway restart instead. </Step>

像讲绘本

原文小纸条

<Step title="Configure OpenClaw and pair"> <Tabs> <Tab title="Ask your agent"> Chat with your OpenClaw agent on any existing channel (e.g. Telegram) and tell it. If Discord is your first channel, use the CLI / config tab instead.

原文小纸条

<Tab title="CLI"> ``bash theme={"theme":{"light":"min-light","dark":"min-dark"}} openclaw pairing list discord openclaw pairing approve discord <CODE> `` </Tab> </Tabs>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Pairing codes expire after 1 hour.”。

原文小纸条

Pairing codes expire after 1 hour.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“You should now be able to chat with your 机器人朋友 in Discord via DM. </Step> </Steps>”。

原文小纸条

You should now be able to chat with your agent in Discord via DM. </Step> </Steps>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Note> Token resolution is account-aware. 设置说明书 token values win over env fallback. DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN is only used for…”。

原文小纸条

<Note> Token resolution is account-aware. Config token values win over env fallback. DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN is only used for the default account. For advanced outbound calls (message tool/channel actions), an explicit per-call token is used for that call. This applies to send and read/probe-style actions (for example read/search/fetch/thread/pins/permissions). Account policy/retry settings still come from the selected account in the active runtime snapshot. </Note>

第 3 站

Recommended: Set up a guild workspace

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Recommended: Set up a guild workspace”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Once DMs are working, you can set up your Discord 大房子服务器 as a full workspace where each 消息通道 gets its own 机器人朋友 session…”。

原文小纸条

Once DMs are working, you can set up your Discord server as a full workspace where each channel gets its own agent session with its own context. This is recommended for private servers where it's just you and your bot.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Steps> <Step title="Add your 大房子服务器 to the guild allowlist"> This enables your 机器人朋友 to respond in any 消息通道 on your 大房…”。

原文小纸条

<Steps> <Step title="Add your server to the guild allowlist"> This enables your agent to respond in any channel on your server, not just DMs.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tabs> <Tab title="Ask your 机器人朋友"> > "Add my Discord 大房子服务器 ID <大房子服务器_id> to the guild allowlist" </Tab>”。

原文小纸条

<Tabs> <Tab title="Ask your agent"> > "Add my Discord Server ID <server_id> to the guild allowlist" </Tab>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tab title="设置说明书"> </Tab> </Tabs> </Step>”。

原文小纸条

<Tab title="Config"> ``json5 theme={"theme":{"light":"min-light","dark":"min-dark"}} { channels: { discord: { groupPolicy: "allowlist", guilds: { YOUR_SERVER_ID: { requireMention: true, users: ["YOUR_USER_ID"], }, }, }, }, } `` </Tab> </Tabs> </Step>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Step title="Allow responses without @mention"> By default, your 机器人朋友 only responds in guild 消息通道s when @mentioned. Fo…”。

原文小纸条

<Step title="Allow responses without @mention"> By default, your agent only responds in guild channels when @mentioned. For a private server, you probably want it to respond to every message.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tabs> <Tab title="Ask your 机器人朋友"> > "Allow my 机器人朋友 to respond on this 大房子服务器 without having to be @mentioned" </Tab>”。

原文小纸条

<Tabs> <Tab title="Ask your agent"> > "Allow my agent to respond on this server without having to be @mentioned" </Tab>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tab title="设置说明书"> Set requireMention: false in your guild 设置说明书:”。

原文小纸条

<Tab title="Config"> Set requireMention: false in your guild config:

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“</Tab> </Tabs> </Step>”。

原文小纸条

``json5 theme={"theme":{"light":"min-light","dark":"min-dark"}} { channels: { discord: { guilds: { YOUR_SERVER_ID: { requireMention: false, }, }, }, }, } `` </Tab> </Tabs> </Step>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Step title="Plan for memory in guild 消息通道s"> By default, long-term memory (MEMORY.md) only loads in DM sessions. Guild…”。

原文小纸条

<Step title="Plan for memory in guild channels"> By default, long-term memory (MEMORY.md) only loads in DM sessions. Guild channels do not auto-load MEMORY.md.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tabs> <Tab title="Ask your 机器人朋友"> > "When I ask questions in Discord 消息通道s, use memory\_search or memory\_get if you…”。

原文小纸条

<Tabs> <Tab title="Ask your agent"> > "When I ask questions in Discord channels, use memory\_search or memory\_get if you need long-term context from MEMORY.md." </Tab>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tab title="Manual"> If you need shared context in every 消息通道, put the stable instructions in 机器人朋友S.md or USER.md (the…”。

原文小纸条

<Tab title="Manual"> If you need shared context in every channel, put the stable instructions in AGENTS.md or USER.md (they are injected for every session). Keep long-term notes in MEMORY.md and access them on demand with memory tools. </Tab> </Tabs> </Step> </Steps>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Now create some 消息通道s on your Discord 大房子服务器 and start chatting. Your 机器人朋友 can see the 消息通道 name, and each 消息通道 gets i…”。

原文小纸条

Now create some channels on your Discord server and start chatting. Your agent can see the channel name, and each channel gets its own isolated session — so you can set up #coding, #home, #research, or whatever fits your workflow.

第 4 站

Runtime 聪明脑袋模型

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Runtime 聪明脑袋模型”。

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Runtime model”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：门口的小门卫 owns the Discord connection.、Reply routing is deterministic: Discord i…、By default (session.dmScope=main), direct…、Guild 消息通道s are isolated session keys (机器…。

原文小纸条
  • Gateway owns the Discord connection.
  • Reply routing is deterministic: Discord inbound replies back to Discord.
  • By default (session.dmScope=main), direct chats share the agent main session (agent:main:main).
  • Guild channels are isolated session keys (agent:<agentId>:discord:channel:<channelId>).
  • Group DMs are ignored by default (channels.discord.dm.groupEnabled=false).
  • Native slash commands run in isolated command sessions (agent:<agentId>:discord:slash:<userId>), while still carrying CommandTargetSessionKey to the routed conversation session.

第 5 站

Forum 消息通道s

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Forum 消息通道s”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Discord forum and media 消息通道s only accept thread posts. OpenClaw supports two ways to create them:”。

原文小纸条

Discord forum and media channels only accept thread posts. OpenClaw supports two ways to create them:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Forum channels”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：Send a 小纸条消息 to the forum parent (消息通道:<f…、Use openclaw 小纸条消息 thread create to creat…。

原文小纸条
  • Send a message to the forum parent (channel:<forumId>) to auto-create a thread. The thread title uses the first non-empty line of your message.
  • Use openclaw message thread create to create a thread directly. Do not pass --message-id for forum channels.
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Example: send to forum parent to create a thread”。

原文小纸条

Example: send to forum parent to create a thread

像魔法口令拆解

这是一句直接对 OpenClaw 说的话，就像对小助手下达任务。

  • 这里在给“openclaw message send --channel discord --target channel”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“<forumId> \”。
  • 这一行“--message "Topic title\nBody of the post"”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
原文代码块
openclaw message send --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \
  --message "Topic title\nBody of the post"
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Example: create a forum thread explicitly”。

原文小纸条

Example: create a forum thread explicitly

像魔法口令拆解

这是一句直接对 OpenClaw 说的话，就像对小助手下达任务。

  • 这里在给“openclaw message thread create --channel discord --target channel”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“<forumId> \”。
  • 这一行“--thread-name "Topic title" --message "Body of the post"”是当前步骤要交给电脑的一小块提示。
原文代码块
openclaw message thread create --channel discord --target channel:<forumId> \
  --thread-name "Topic title" --message "Body of the post"
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Forum parents do not accept Discord components. If you need components, send to the thread itself (消息通道:<threadId>).”。

原文小纸条

Forum parents do not accept Discord components. If you need components, send to the thread itself (channel:<threadId>).

第 6 站

Interactive components

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Interactive components”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“OpenClaw supports Discord components v2 containers for 机器人朋友 小纸条消息s. Use the 小纸条消息 工具小帮手 with a components payload. Int…”。

原文小纸条

OpenClaw supports Discord components v2 containers for agent messages. Use the message tool with a components payload. Interaction results are routed back to the agent as normal inbound messages and follow the existing Discord replyToMode settings.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Supported blocks:”。

原文小纸条

Supported blocks:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Interactive components”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：text, section, separator, actions, media-…、Action rows allow up to 5 buttons or a si…、Select types: string, user, role, mention…。

原文小纸条
  • text, section, separator, actions, media-gallery, file
  • Action rows allow up to 5 buttons or a single select menu
  • Select types: string, user, role, mentionable, channel
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“By default, components are single use. Set components.reusable=true to allow buttons, selects, and forms to be used mul…”。

原文小纸条

By default, components are single use. Set components.reusable=true to allow buttons, selects, and forms to be used multiple times until they expire.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“To restrict who can click a button, set allowedUsers on that button (Discord user IDs, tags, or *). When 设置说明书ured, unm…”。

原文小纸条

To restrict who can click a button, set allowedUsers on that button (Discord user IDs, tags, or *). When configured, unmatched users receive an ephemeral denial.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“The /聪明脑袋模型 and /聪明脑袋模型s slash 魔法口令s open an interactive 聪明脑袋模型 picker with provider and 聪明脑袋模型 dropdowns plus a Submit…”。

原文小纸条

The /model and /models slash commands open an interactive model picker with provider and model dropdowns plus a Submit step. The picker reply is ephemeral and only the invoking user can use it.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“File attachments:”。

原文小纸条

File attachments:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Interactive components”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：file blocks must point to an attachment r…、Provide the attachment via media/path/fil…、Use filename to override the upload name…。

原文小纸条
  • file blocks must point to an attachment reference (attachment://<filename>)
  • Provide the attachment via media/path/filePath (single file); use media-gallery for multiple files
  • Use filename to override the upload name when it should match the attachment reference
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Modal forms:”。

原文小纸条

Modal forms:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Interactive components”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：Add components.modal with up to 5 fields、Field types: text, checkbox, radio, selec…、OpenClaw adds a trigger button automatica…。

原文小纸条
  • Add components.modal with up to 5 fields
  • Field types: text, checkbox, radio, select, role-select, user-select
  • OpenClaw adds a trigger button automatically
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Example:”。

原文小纸条

Example:

像魔法口令拆解

这段不是故事对白，而是设置卡片，像在给机器人贴名字、地址和规则标签。

  • 大括号像把同一组设置抱在一起，说“这些是一家的”。
  • 这里在给“channel”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“discord”。
  • 这里在给“action”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“send”。
原文代码块
{
  channel: "discord",
  action: "send",
  to: "channel:123456789012345678",
  message: "Optional fallback text",
  components: {
    reusable: true,
    text: "Choose a path",
    blocks: [
      {
        type: "actions",
        buttons: [
          {
            label: "Approve",
            style: "success",
            allowedUsers: ["123456789012345678"],
          },
          { label: "Decline", style: "danger" },
        ],
      },
      {
        type: "actions",
        select: {
          type: "string",
          placeholder: "Pick an option",
          options: [
            { label: "Option A", value: "a" },
            { label: "Option B", value: "b" },
          ],
        },
      },
    ],
    modal: {
      title: "Details",
      triggerLabel: "Open form",
      fields: [
        { type: "text", label: "Requester" },
        {
          type: "select",
          label: "Priority",
          options: [
            { label: "Low", value: "low" },
            { label: "High", value: "high" },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
  },
}

第 7 站

Access control and routing

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Access control and routing”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tabs> <Tab title="DM policy"> 消息通道s.discord.dmPolicy controls DM access (legacy: 消息通道s.discord.dm.policy):”。

原文小纸条

<Tabs> <Tab title="DM policy"> channels.discord.dmPolicy controls DM access (legacy: channels.discord.dm.policy):

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Access control and routing”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：pairing (default)、allowlist、open (requires 消息通道s.discord.allowFrom to…、disabled。

原文小纸条
  • pairing (default)
  • allowlist
  • open (requires channels.discord.allowFrom to include "*"; legacy: channels.discord.dm.allowFrom)
  • disabled
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“If DM policy is not open, unknown users are blocked (or prompted for pairing in pairing mode).”。

原文小纸条

If DM policy is not open, unknown users are blocked (or prompted for pairing in pairing mode).

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Multi-account precedence:”。

原文小纸条

Multi-account precedence:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Access control and routing”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：消息通道s.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom…、Named accounts inherit 消息通道s.discord.allo…、Named accounts do not inherit 消息通道s.disco…。

原文小纸条
  • channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom applies only to the default account.
  • Named accounts inherit channels.discord.allowFrom when their own allowFrom is unset.
  • Named accounts do not inherit channels.discord.accounts.default.allowFrom.
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“DM target format for delivery:”。

原文小纸条

DM target format for delivery:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Access control and routing”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：user:<id>、<@id> mention。

原文小纸条
  • user:<id>
  • <@id> mention
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Bare numeric IDs are ambiguous and rejected unless an explicit user/消息通道 target kind is provided. </Tab>”。

原文小纸条

Bare numeric IDs are ambiguous and rejected unless an explicit user/channel target kind is provided. </Tab>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tab title="Guild policy"> Guild handling is controlled by 消息通道s.discord.大家一起的房间Policy:”。

原文小纸条

<Tab title="Guild policy"> Guild handling is controlled by channels.discord.groupPolicy:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Access control and routing”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：open、allowlist、disabled。

原文小纸条
  • open
  • allowlist
  • disabled
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Secure baseline when 消息通道s.discord exists is allowlist.”。

原文小纸条

Secure baseline when channels.discord exists is allowlist.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“allowlist behavior:”。

原文小纸条

allowlist behavior:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Access control and routing”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：guild must match 消息通道s.discord.guilds (id…、optional sender allowlists: users (stable…、direct name/tag matching is disabled by d…、names/tags are supported for users, but I…。

原文小纸条
  • guild must match channels.discord.guilds (id preferred, slug accepted)
  • optional sender allowlists: users (stable IDs recommended) and roles (role IDs only); if either is configured, senders are allowed when they match users OR roles
  • direct name/tag matching is disabled by default; enable channels.discord.dangerouslyAllowNameMatching: true only as break-glass compatibility mode
  • names/tags are supported for users, but IDs are safer; openclaw security audit warns when name/tag entries are used
  • if a guild has channels configured, non-listed channels are denied
  • if a guild has no channels block, all channels in that allowlisted guild are allowed
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Example:”。

原文小纸条

Example:

像讲绘本

这一小段像旁白，提醒我们现在讲到哪一步了。

原文小纸条

``json5 theme={"theme":{"light":"min-light","dark":"min-dark"}} { channels: { discord: { groupPolicy: "allowlist", guilds: { "123456789012345678": { requireMention: true, ignoreOtherMentions: true, users: ["987654321098765432"], roles: ["123456789012345678"], channels: { general: { allow: true }, help: { allow: true, requireMention: true }, }, }, }, }, }, } ``

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“If you only set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and do not create a 消息通道s.discord block, runtime fallback is 大家一起的房间Policy="allowlist…”。

原文小纸条

If you only set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and do not create a channels.discord block, runtime fallback is groupPolicy="allowlist" (with a warning in logs), even if channels.defaults.groupPolicy is open. </Tab>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Tab title="Mentions and 大家一起的房间 DMs"> Guild 小纸条消息s are mention-gated by default.”。

原文小纸条

<Tab title="Mentions and group DMs"> Guild messages are mention-gated by default.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Mention detection includes:”。

原文小纸条

Mention detection includes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Access control and routing”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：explicit bot mention、设置说明书ured mention patterns (机器人朋友s.list[]…、implicit reply-to-bot behavior in support…。

原文小纸条
  • explicit bot mention
  • configured mention patterns (agents.list[].groupChat.mentionPatterns, fallback messages.groupChat.mentionPatterns)
  • implicit reply-to-bot behavior in supported cases
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“requireMention is 设置说明书ured per guild/消息通道 (消息通道s.discord.guilds...). ignoreOtherMentions optionally drops 小纸条消息s that…”。

原文小纸条

requireMention is configured per guild/channel (channels.discord.guilds...). ignoreOtherMentions optionally drops messages that mention another user/role but not the bot (excluding @everyone/@here).

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“大家一起的房间 DMs:”。

Group DMs:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Access control and routing”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：default: ignored (dm.大家一起的房间Enabled=false)、optional allowlist via dm.大家一起的房间消息通道s (消…。

原文小纸条
  • default: ignored (dm.groupEnabled=false)
  • optional allowlist via dm.groupChannels (channel IDs or slugs)

第 8 站

Role-based 机器人朋友 routing

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Role-based 机器人朋友 routing”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Use bindings[].match.roles to route Discord guild members to different 机器人朋友s by role ID. Role-based bindings accept ro…”。

原文小纸条

Use bindings[].match.roles to route Discord guild members to different agents by role ID. Role-based bindings accept role IDs only and are evaluated after peer or parent-peer bindings and before guild-only bindings. If a binding also sets other match fields (for example peer + guildId + roles), all configured fields must match.

像魔法口令拆解

这段不是故事对白，而是设置卡片，像在给机器人贴名字、地址和规则标签。

  • 大括号像把同一组设置抱在一起，说“这些是一家的”。
  • 这里在给“bindings”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“[”。
  • 大括号像把同一组设置抱在一起，说“这些是一家的”。
原文代码块
{
  bindings: [
    {
      agentId: "opus",
      match: {
        channel: "discord",
        guildId: "123456789012345678",
        roles: ["111111111111111111"],
      },
    },
    {
      agentId: "sonnet",
      match: {
        channel: "discord",
        guildId: "123456789012345678",
      },
    },
  ],
}

Presence intent is optional and only required if you want to receive presence updates. Setting bot presence (setPresence) does not require enabling presence updates for members. </Accordion>

  • user ID
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Prefer numeric IDs in OpenClaw 设置说明书 for reliable audits and probes. </Accordion> </Accordion大家一起的房间>”。

原文小纸条

Prefer numeric IDs in OpenClaw config for reliable audits and probes. </Accordion> </AccordionGroup>

第 10 站

Native 魔法口令s and 魔法口令 auth

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Native 魔法口令s and 魔法口令 auth”。

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Native commands and command auth”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：魔法口令s.native defaults to "auto" and is en…、Per-消息通道 override: 消息通道s.discord.魔法口令s.na…、魔法口令s.native=false explicitly clears prev…、Native 魔法口令 auth uses the same Discord al…。

原文小纸条
  • commands.native defaults to "auto" and is enabled for Discord.
  • Per-channel override: channels.discord.commands.native.
  • commands.native=false explicitly clears previously registered Discord native commands.
  • Native command auth uses the same Discord allowlists/policies as normal message handling.
  • Commands may still be visible in Discord UI for users who are not authorized; execution still enforces OpenClaw auth and returns "not authorized".
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“See Slash 魔法口令s for 魔法口令 catalog and behavior.”。

原文小纸条

See Slash commands for command catalog and behavior.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Default slash 魔法口令 settings:”。

原文小纸条

Default slash command settings:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Native commands and command auth”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：ephemeral: true。

原文小纸条
  • ephemeral: true

Message IDs are surfaced in context/history so agents can target specific messages. </Accordion>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Accordion title="Live 一边说一边送 preview"> OpenClaw can 一边说一边送 draft replies by sending a temporary 小纸条消息 and editing it a…”。

原文小纸条

<Accordion title="Live stream preview"> OpenClaw can stream draft replies by sending a temporary message and editing it as text arrives.

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：消息通道s.discord.一边说一边送ing controls preview…、Default stays off because Discord preview…、progress is accepted for cross-消息通道 consi…、消息通道s.discord.一边说一边送Mode is a legacy alia…。

原文小纸条
  • channels.discord.streaming controls preview streaming (off | partial | block | progress, default: off).
  • Default stays off because Discord preview edits can hit rate limits quickly, especially when multiple bots or gateways share the same account or guild traffic.
  • progress is accepted for cross-channel consistency and maps to partial on Discord.
  • channels.discord.streamMode is a legacy alias and is auto-migrated.
  • partial edits a single preview message as tokens arrive.
  • block emits draft-sized chunks (use draftChunk to tune size and breakpoints).
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Example:”。

原文小纸条

Preview streaming is text-only; media replies fall back to normal delivery.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Note: preview 一边说一边送ing is separate from block 一边说一边送ing. When block 一边说一边送ing is explicitly enabled for Discord, OpenC…”。

原文小纸条

Note: preview streaming is separate from block streaming. When block streaming is explicitly enabled for Discord, OpenClaw skips the preview stream to avoid double streaming. </Accordion>

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：Discord threads are routed as 消息通道 sessio…、parent thread metadata can be used for pa…、thread 设置说明书 inherits parent 消息通道 设置说明书 u…。

原文小纸条
  • Discord threads are routed as channel sessions
  • parent thread metadata can be used for parent-session linkage
  • thread config inherits parent channel config unless a thread-specific entry exists

Channel topics are injected as **untrusted** context (not as system prompt). </Accordion>

<Accordion title="Thread-bound sessions for subagents"> Discord can bind a thread to a session target so follow-up messages in that thread keep routing to the same session (including subagent sessions).

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：/focus <target> bind current/new thread t…、/unfocus remove current thread binding、/机器人朋友s show active runs and binding state、/session idle <duration off> inspect/upda…。

原文小纸条
  • /focus <target> bind current/new thread to a subagent/session target
  • /unfocus remove current thread binding
  • /agents show active runs and binding state
  • /session idle <duration|off> inspect/update inactivity auto-unfocus for focused bindings
  • /session max-age <duration|off> inspect/update hard max age for focused bindings
像讲绘本

原文小纸条

``json5 theme={"theme":{"light":"min-light","dark":"min-dark"}} { session: { threadBindings: { enabled: true, idleHours: 24, maxAgeHours: 0, }, }, channels: { discord: { threadBindings: { enabled: true, idleHours: 24, maxAgeHours: 0, spawnSubagentSessions: false, // opt-in }, }, }, } ``

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：session.threadBindings.* sets global defa…、消息通道s.discord.threadBindings.* overrides…、spawnSub机器人朋友Sessions must be true to aut…、spawnAcpSessions must be true to auto-cre…。

原文小纸条
  • session.threadBindings.* sets global defaults.
  • channels.discord.threadBindings.* overrides Discord behavior.
  • spawnSubagentSessions must be true to auto-create/bind threads for sessions_spawn({ thread: true }).
  • spawnAcpSessions must be true to auto-create/bind threads for ACP (/acp spawn ... --thread ... or sessions_spawn({ runtime: "acp", thread: true })).
  • If thread bindings are disabled for an account, /focus and related thread binding operations are unavailable.
像讲绘本

See Sub-agents, ACP Agents, and Configuration Reference. </Accordion>

原文小纸条

``json5 theme={"theme":{"light":"min-light","dark":"min-dark"}} { agents: { list: [ { id: "codex", runtime: { type: "acp", acp: { agent: "codex", backend: "acpx", mode: "persistent", cwd: "/workspace/openclaw", }, }, }, ], }, bindings: [ { type: "acp", agentId: "codex", match: { channel: "discord", accountId: "default", peer: { kind: "channel", id: "222222222222222222" }, }, acp: { label: "codex-main" }, }, ], channels: { discord: { guilds: { "111111111111111111": { channels: { "222222222222222222": { requireMention: false, }, }, }, }, }, }, } ``

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：/acp spawn codex --bind here binds the cu…、That can still mean "start a fresh Codex…、Codex may still run in its own cwd or bac…、Thread 小纸条消息s can inherit the parent 消息通道…。

原文小纸条
  • /acp spawn codex --bind here binds the current Discord channel or thread in place and keeps future messages routed to the same ACP session.
  • That can still mean "start a fresh Codex ACP session", but it does not create a new Discord thread by itself. The existing channel stays the chat surface.
  • Codex may still run in its own cwd or backend workspace on disk. That workspace is runtime state, not a Discord thread.
  • Thread messages can inherit the parent channel ACP binding.
  • In a bound channel or thread, /new and /reset reset the same ACP session in place.
  • Temporary thread bindings still work and can override target resolution while active.
  • spawnAcpSessions is only required when OpenClaw needs to create/bind a child thread via --thread auto|here. It is not required for /acp spawn ... --bind here in the current channel.
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“See ACP 机器人朋友s for binding behavior details. </Accordion>”。

原文小纸条

See ACP Agents for binding behavior details. </Accordion>

<Accordion title="Gateway proxy"> Route Discord gateway WebSocket traffic and startup REST lookups (application ID + allowlist resolution) through an HTTP(S) proxy with channels.discord.proxy.

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：allowlists can use pk:<memberId>、member display names are matched by name/…、lookups use original 小纸条消息 ID and are tim…、if lookup fails, proxied 小纸条消息s are treat…。

原文小纸条
  • allowlists can use pk:<memberId>
  • member display names are matched by name/slug only when channels.discord.dangerouslyAllowNameMatching: true
  • lookups use original message ID and are time-window constrained
  • if lookup fails, proxied messages are treated as bot messages and dropped unless allowBots=true

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：0: Playing、1: 一边说一边送ing (requires activityUrl)、2: Listening、3: Watching。

原文小纸条
  • 0: Playing
  • 1: Streaming (requires activityUrl)
  • 2: Listening
  • 3: Watching
  • 4: Custom (uses the activity text as the status state; emoji is optional)
  • 5: Competing

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：消息通道s.discord.execApprovals.enabled、消息通道s.discord.execApprovals.approvers、消息通道s.discord.execApprovals.target (dm 消息…、机器人朋友Filter, sessionFilter, cleanupAfterR…。

原文小纸条
  • channels.discord.execApprovals.enabled
  • channels.discord.execApprovals.approvers
  • channels.discord.execApprovals.target (dm | channel | both, default: dm)
  • agentFilter, sessionFilter, cleanupAfterResolve
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“When target is 消息通道 or both, the approval prompt is visible in the 消息通道. Only 设置说明书ured approvers can use the buttons;…”。

原文小纸条

When target is channel or both, the approval prompt is visible in the channel. Only configured approvers can use the buttons; other users receive an ephemeral denial. Approval prompts include the command text, so only enable channel delivery in trusted channels. If the channel ID cannot be derived from the session key, OpenClaw falls back to DM delivery.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“门口的小门卫 auth for this handler uses the same shared credential resolution contract as other 门口的小门卫 来帮忙的小伙伴s:”。

原文小纸条

Gateway auth for this handler uses the same shared credential resolution contract as other Gateway clients:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Feature details”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：env-first local auth (OPENCLAW_门口的小门卫_TOK…、in local mode, 门口的小门卫.remote.* can be use…、remote-mode support via 门口的小门卫.remote.* w…、URL overrides are override-safe: CLI over…。

原文小纸条
  • env-first local auth (OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN / OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PASSWORD then gateway.auth.*)
  • in local mode, gateway.remote.* can be used as fallback only when gateway.auth.* is unset; configured-but-unresolved local SecretRefs fail closed
  • remote-mode support via gateway.remote.* when applicable
  • URL overrides are override-safe: CLI overrides do not reuse implicit credentials, and env overrides use env credentials only
像讲绘本

原文小纸条

If approvals fail with unknown approval IDs, verify approver list and feature enablement.

  • moderation: timeout, kick, ban

第 13 站

Components v2 UI

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Components v2 UI”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“OpenClaw uses Discord components v2 for exec approvals and cross-context markers. Discord 小纸条消息 actions can also accept…”。

原文小纸条

OpenClaw uses Discord components v2 for exec approvals and cross-context markers. Discord message actions can also accept components for custom UI (advanced; requires Carbon component instances), while legacy embeds remain available but are not recommended.

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Components v2 UI”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：消息通道s.discord.ui.components.accentColor s…、Set per account with 消息通道s.discord.accoun…、embeds are ignored when components v2 are…。

原文小纸条
  • channels.discord.ui.components.accentColor sets the accent color used by Discord component containers (hex).
  • Set per account with channels.discord.accounts.<id>.ui.components.accentColor.
  • embeds are ignored when components v2 are present.
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Example:”。

原文小纸条

Example:

像魔法口令拆解

这段不是故事对白，而是设置卡片，像在给机器人贴名字、地址和规则标签。

  • 大括号像把同一组设置抱在一起，说“这些是一家的”。
  • 这里在给“channels”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“{”。
  • 这里在给“discord”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“{”。
原文代码块
{
  channels: {
    discord: {
      ui: {
        components: {
          accentColor: "#5865F2",
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

第 14 站

Voice 消息通道s

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“OpenClaw can join Discord voice 消息通道s for realtime, continuous conversations. This is separate from voice 小纸条消息 attachm…”。

原文小纸条

OpenClaw can join Discord voice channels for realtime, continuous conversations. This is separate from voice message attachments.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Requirements:”。

原文小纸条

Requirements:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Voice channels”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：Enable native 魔法口令s (魔法口令s.native or 消息通道…、设置说明书ure 消息通道s.discord.voice.、The bot needs Connect + Speak permissions…。

原文小纸条
  • Enable native commands (commands.native or channels.discord.commands.native).
  • Configure channels.discord.voice.
  • The bot needs Connect + Speak permissions in the target voice channel.
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Use the Discord-only native 魔法口令 /vc join leave status to control sessions. The 魔法口令 uses the account default 机器人朋友 and…”。

原文小纸条

Use the Discord-only native command /vc join|leave|status to control sessions. The command uses the account default agent and follows the same allowlist and group policy rules as other Discord commands.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Auto-join example:”。

原文小纸条

Auto-join example:

像魔法口令拆解

这段不是故事对白，而是设置卡片，像在给机器人贴名字、地址和规则标签。

  • 大括号像把同一组设置抱在一起，说“这些是一家的”。
  • 这里在给“channels”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“{”。
  • 这里在给“discord”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“{”。
原文代码块
{
  channels: {
    discord: {
      voice: {
        enabled: true,
        autoJoin: [
          {
            guildId: "123456789012345678",
            channelId: "234567890123456789",
          },
        ],
        daveEncryption: true,
        decryptionFailureTolerance: 24,
        tts: {
          provider: "openai",
          openai: { voice: "alloy" },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Notes:”。

原文小纸条

Notes:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Voice channels”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：voice.tts overrides 小纸条消息s.tts for voice…、Voice transcript turns derive owner statu…、Voice is enabled by default; set 消息通道s.di…、voice.daveEncryption and voice.decryption…。

原文小纸条
  • voice.tts overrides messages.tts for voice playback only.
  • Voice transcript turns derive owner status from Discord allowFrom (or dm.allowFrom); non-owner speakers cannot access owner-only tools (for example gateway and cron).
  • Voice is enabled by default; set channels.discord.voice.enabled=false to disable it.
  • voice.daveEncryption and voice.decryptionFailureTolerance pass through to @discordjs/voice join options.
  • @discordjs/voice defaults are daveEncryption=true and decryptionFailureTolerance=24 if unset.
  • OpenClaw also watches receive decrypt failures and auto-recovers by leaving/rejoining the voice channel after repeated failures in a short window.
  • If receive logs repeatedly show DecryptionFailed(UnencryptedWhenPassthroughDisabled), this may be the upstream @discordjs/voice receive bug tracked in discord.js #11419.

第 15 站

Voice 小纸条消息s

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Voice 小纸条消息s”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Discord voice 小纸条消息s show a waveform preview and require OGG/Opus audio plus metadata. OpenClaw generates the waveform…”。

原文小纸条

Discord voice messages show a waveform preview and require OGG/Opus audio plus metadata. OpenClaw generates the waveform automatically, but it needs ffmpeg and ffprobe available on the gateway host to inspect and convert audio files.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Requirements and constraints:”。

原文小纸条

Requirements and constraints:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Voice messages”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：Provide a **local file path** (URLs are r…、Omit text content (Discord does not allow…、Any audio format is accepted; OpenClaw co…。

原文小纸条
  • Provide a **local file path** (URLs are rejected).
  • Omit text content (Discord does not allow text + voice message in the same payload).
  • Any audio format is accepted; OpenClaw converts to OGG/Opus when needed.
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Example:”。

原文小纸条

Example:

像魔法口令拆解

这是一串终端魔法口令，像按步骤按下几个按钮，让电脑开始干活。

  • 这里在给“message(action=send channel=discord target=channel”贴标签，意思是把它设置成“123 path=/path/to/audio.mp3 asVoice=true)”。
原文代码块
message(action="send", channel="discord", target="channel:123", path="/path/to/audio.mp3", asVoice=true)

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Troubleshooting”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：enable 小纸条消息 Content Intent、enable 大房子服务器 Members Intent when you dep…、restart 门口的小门卫 after changing intents。

原文小纸条
  • enable Message Content Intent
  • enable Server Members Intent when you depend on user/member resolution
  • restart gateway after changing intents

这一组条目像“Troubleshooting”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：verify 大家一起的房间Policy、verify guild allowlist under 消息通道s.discor…、if guild 消息通道s map exists, only listed 消息…、verify requireMention behavior and mentio…。

  • verify guild allowlist under channels.discord.guilds
  • if guild channels map exists, only listed channels are allowed
  • verify requireMention behavior and mention patterns

这一组条目像“Troubleshooting”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：大家一起的房间Policy="allowlist" without matchin…、requireMention 设置说明书ured in the wrong pla…、sender blocked by guild/消息通道 users allowl…。

原文小纸条
  • single-account: channels.discord.inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs
  • multi-account: channels.discord.accounts.<accountId>.inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs
  • default: 1800000 (30 minutes); set 0 to disable

原文小纸条

Use eventQueue.listenerTimeout for slow listener setup and inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs only if you want a separate safety valve for queued agent turns. </Accordion>

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Accordion title="Permissions audit mismatches"> 消息通道s status --probe permission checks only work for numeric 消息通道 IDs.”。

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“If you use slug keys, runtime matching can still work, but probe cannot fully verify permissions. </Accordion>”。

If you use slug keys, runtime matching can still work, but probe cannot fully verify permissions. </Accordion>

这一组条目像“Troubleshooting”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：DM disabled: 消息通道s.discord.dm.enabled=fal…、DM policy disabled: 消息通道s.discord.dmPolic…、awaiting pairing approval in pairing mode。

原文小纸条
  • DM disabled: channels.discord.dm.enabled=false
  • DM policy disabled: channels.discord.dmPolicy="disabled" (legacy: channels.discord.dm.policy)
  • awaiting pairing approval in pairing mode
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“<Accordion title="Bot to bot loops"> By default bot-authored 小纸条消息s are ignored.”。

原文小纸条

<Accordion title="Bot to bot loops"> By default bot-authored messages are ignored.

像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“If you set 消息通道s.discord.allowBots=true, use strict mention and allowlist rules to avoid loop behavior. Prefer 消息通道s.di…”。

原文小纸条

If you set channels.discord.allowBots=true, use strict mention and allowlist rules to avoid loop behavior. Prefer channels.discord.allowBots="mentions" to only accept bot messages that mention the bot. </Accordion>

像讲绘本

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Troubleshooting”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：keep OpenClaw current (openclaw update) s…、confirm 消息通道s.discord.voice.daveEncryptio…、start from 消息通道s.discord.voice.decryption…、watch logs for:。

原文小纸条
  • keep OpenClaw current (openclaw update) so the Discord voice receive recovery logic is present
  • confirm channels.discord.voice.daveEncryption=true (default)
  • start from channels.discord.voice.decryptionFailureTolerance=24 (upstream default) and tune only if needed
  • watch logs for:
  • discord voice: DAVE decrypt failures detected
  • discord voice: repeated decrypt failures; attempting rejoin
  • if failures continue after automatic rejoin, collect logs and compare against discord.js #11419

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Configuration reference pointers”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：设置说明书uration reference - Discord。

原文小纸条
  • Configuration reference - Discord
像讲绘本

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“High-signal Discord fields:”。

原文小纸条

High-signal Discord fields:

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Configuration reference pointers”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：startup/auth: enabled, token, accounts.*,…、policy: 大家一起的房间Policy, dm.*, guilds.*, gu…、魔法口令: 魔法口令s.native, 魔法口令s.useAccess大家一起的房…、event queue: eventQueue.listenerTimeout (…。

原文小纸条
  • startup/auth: enabled, token, accounts.*, allowBots
  • policy: groupPolicy, dm.*, guilds.*, guilds.*.channels.*
  • command: commands.native, commands.useAccessGroups, configWrites, slashCommand.*
  • event queue: eventQueue.listenerTimeout (listener budget), eventQueue.maxQueueSize, eventQueue.maxConcurrency
  • inbound worker: inboundWorker.runTimeoutMs
  • reply/history: replyToMode, historyLimit, dmHistoryLimit, dms.*.historyLimit
  • delivery: textChunkLimit, chunkMode, maxLinesPerMessage
  • streaming: streaming (legacy alias: streamMode), draftChunk, blockStreaming, blockStreamingCoalesce
  • media/retry: mediaMaxMb, retry
  • mediaMaxMb caps outbound Discord uploads (default: 8MB)
  • actions: actions.*
  • presence: activity, status, activityType, activityUrl
  • UI: ui.components.accentColor
  • features: threadBindings, top-level bindings[] (type: "acp"), pluralkit, execApprovals, intents, agentComponents, heartbeat, responsePrefix

第 18 站

Safety and operations

把它讲给 5 岁小朋友听，就是：先认识这里出现的几个角色和规则，再按顺序照着做。这里最重要的意思是“Safety and operations”。

像准备清单

这一组条目像“Safety and operations”的小卡片，告诉我们要准备哪些东西、哪些规则不能漏掉。先记住这几个重点：Treat bot tokens as secrets (DISCORD_BOT_…、Grant least-privilege Discord permissions.、If 魔法口令 deploy/state is stale, restart 门口…。

原文小纸条
  • Treat bot tokens as secrets (DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN preferred in supervised environments).
  • Grant least-privilege Discord permissions.
  • If command deploy/state is stale, restart gateway and re-check with openclaw channels status --probe.
